---
title: "anurag builds things"
title-block-banner: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
        .anchorjs-link { display: none !important; }
        .quarto-listing .list .quarto-post:nth-child(odd),
        .quarto-listing .list .quarto-post:nth-child(even) {
          background: transparent !important;
        }
      </style>
      <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
          document.body.classList.add('home');
        });
      </script>
listing:
  id: log
  contents: posts
  type: default
  image-align: right
  image-height: "158px"
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
  feed: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
page-layout: custom
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<!-- ── Hero standfirst ────────────────────────────────────── -->
<h1 class="hero-standfirst">
  anurag builds <span class="rotator accent"><span class="word active">working</span><span class="word">broken</span><span class="word">honest</span><span class="word">weird</span><span class="word">small</span><span class="word">quiet</span></span> things
</h1>

<script>
  (function () {
    var words = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-standfirst .rotator .word');
    if (words.length < 2) return;
    if (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) return;
    var i = 0;
    setInterval(function () {
      words[i].classList.remove('active');
      i = (i + 1) % words.length;
      words[i].classList.add('active');
    }, 2800);
  })();
</script>

<p class="hero-dek">
  Every experiment, every note, every YouTube lecture, posted the week it happens.
  No roadmaps. No thought leadership. Just the curves and what they mean.
</p>

```

::: {#log}
:::
